Package org.cibseven.connect.ai.agent.impl

Class AgentRequestImpl

java.lang.Object
org.cibseven.connect.impl.AbstractConnectorRequest<AgentResponse>
org.cibseven.connect.ai.agent.impl.AgentRequestImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AgentRequest, ConnectorRequest<AgentResponse>
public class AgentRequestImpl extends AbstractConnectorRequest<AgentResponse> implements AgentRequest
Default implementation of AgentRequest.

Stores all parameters in the generic request-parameter map inherited from AbstractConnectorRequest so that they are automatically available to any registered ConnectorRequestInterceptor.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class org.cibseven.connect.impl.AbstractConnectorRequest

    • agentName

    • instruction

      public AgentRequest instruction(String instruction)
      Specified by:
      instruction in interface AgentRequest

    • instructionMode

      public AgentRequest instructionMode(String instructionMode)
      Description copied from interface: AgentRequest
      Optional. Controls how AgentRequest.instruction(String) is combined with the bundled default system prompt. See AgentConnector.PARAM_NAME_INSTRUCTION_MODE for allowed values.
      Specified by:
      instructionMode in interface AgentRequest

    • model

      public AgentRequest model(String model)
      Specified by:
      model in interface AgentRequest

    • message

      public AgentRequest message(String message)
      Specified by:
      message in interface AgentRequest

    • toolClasses

      public AgentRequest toolClasses(String toolClasses)
      Description copied from interface: AgentRequest
      Registers tool classes for this request.
      Specified by:
      toolClasses in interface AgentRequest
      Parameters:
      toolClasses - comma-separated list of fully qualified class names

    • apiKey

      public AgentRequest apiKey(String apiKey)
      Specified by:
      apiKey in interface AgentRequest

    • baseUrl

      public AgentRequest baseUrl(String baseUrl)
      Description copied from interface: AgentRequest
      Optional. OpenAI-compatible base URL. When omitted the value is resolved from the OPENAI_BASE_URL environment variable, falling back to the standard OpenAI API endpoint. Examples: Ollama (http://localhost:11434/v1), Azure OpenAI, OpenRouter (https://openrouter.ai/api/v1).
      Specified by:
      baseUrl in interface AgentRequest

    • customHeaders

      public AgentRequest customHeaders(String customHeaders)
      Description copied from interface: AgentRequest
      Optional. Custom HTTP headers attached to every OpenAI-compatible request, encoded as a JSON object of String → String pairs.
      Specified by:
      customHeaders in interface AgentRequest

    • mcpServers

      public AgentRequest mcpServers(String mcpServers)
      Description copied from interface: AgentRequest
      Optional. JSON array describing one or more MCP servers with per-server custom headers. See AgentConnector.PARAM_NAME_MCP_SERVERS for the expected shape.
      Specified by:
      mcpServers in interface AgentRequest

    • reasoningEffort

      public AgentRequest reasoningEffort(String reasoningEffort)
      Description copied from interface: AgentRequest
      Optional. Reasoning effort hint (e.g. "low", "medium", "high"). Values are model-dependent.
      Specified by:
      reasoningEffort in interface AgentRequest

    • reasoningSummary

      public AgentRequest reasoningSummary(String reasoningSummary)
      Description copied from interface: AgentRequest
      Optional. Enables a reasoning summary in AiMessage.thinking() (e.g. "auto"). Setting this value switches to the OpenAI Responses API.
      Specified by:
      reasoningSummary in interface AgentRequest

    • useChatMemory

      public AgentRequest useChatMemory(boolean useChatMemory)
      Description copied from interface: AgentRequest
      Enables or disables chat memory for this invocation. When enabled, the agent's prior messages are loaded from AgentChatMemoryStore keyed by AgentRequest.memoryId(String) and the new exchange is appended.
      Specified by:
      useChatMemory in interface AgentRequest

    • memoryId

      public AgentRequest memoryId(String memoryId)
      Description copied from interface: AgentRequest
      Optional. Memory identifier to reuse across invocations. When unset and AgentRequest.useChatMemory(boolean) is true, the connector generates a new UUID on first call.
      Specified by:
      memoryId in interface AgentRequest

    • chatMemoryMaxMessages

      public AgentRequest chatMemoryMaxMessages(int chatMemoryMaxMessages)
      Description copied from interface: AgentRequest
      Sliding-window size (max messages retained) for the chat memory.
      Specified by:
      chatMemoryMaxMessages in interface AgentRequest

    • persistChatLog

      public AgentRequest persistChatLog(Boolean persistChatLog)
      Description copied from interface: AgentRequest
      Per-activity override for the chat-log audit variable. See AgentConnector.PARAM_NAME_PERSIST_CHAT_LOG. Pass null to defer to the deployment-wide default.
      Specified by:
      persistChatLog in interface AgentRequest

    • pgHost

      public AgentRequest pgHost(String pgHost)
      Description copied from interface: AgentRequest
      PostgreSQL host — when set, RAG is activated using pgvector.
      Specified by:
      pgHost in interface AgentRequest

    • getPersistChatLog

      public Boolean getPersistChatLog()
      Description copied from interface: AgentRequest
      Per-activity override for the chat-log audit variable. Returns null when unset (caller must fall through to the deployment-wide resolver — typically AgentChatListener.isChatLogVariableEnabled()).
      Specified by:
      getPersistChatLog in interface AgentRequest
